description: Style Note Woven trousers from ADIDAS that can be worn casually with T-shirts or casual shirts for a charming and relaxed look - this pair is simply a must have. Comfortable and well fitted, you'll not want to miss out on these trousers! Product Details Black trousers, has a buttoned closure at the waist with a two buttoned fly, drawstring tie at the waist, belt loops around the waist, a small insert pocket below the waistband, two insert pockets in front on the sides, brand patch under the left insert pocket, two insert pockets at the back with buttoned flap closures with branding on the right pocket and a zipped insert pocket under the right insert pocket at the back on the side Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size M
